ons 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Economic Indicators

GDP, inflation, productivity, and population

ons_gdp()
Download GDP data
ons_monthly_gdp()
Download monthly GDP estimate
ons_cpi()
Download consumer price inflation
ons_productivity()
Download labour productivity
ons_population()
Download population estimates

Labour Market

Employment, unemployment, inactivity, and wages

ons_unemployment()
Download unemployment rate
ons_employment()
Download employment rate
ons_inactivity()
Download economic inactivity
ons_wages()
Download average weekly earnings

Trade & Retail

International trade and retail sales

ons_trade()
Download UK trade data
ons_retail_sales()
Download retail sales index

Housing & Public Finances

House prices and government borrowing

ons_house_prices()
Download UK house prices
ons_public_finances()
Download public sector finances

General

Fetch any series or search the ONS catalogue

ons_get()
Download any ONS time series by CDID code
ons_search()
Search for ONS time series

Utilities

Cache management

clear_cache()
Clear the local download cache

On this page
